FOLDER.NAME: AEDW-MDR-ALV
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: ALIS / MDR LEC Voice combined Data Mart solution

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT a.BTN AS BTN_x , a.CUST_CD AS CUST_CD_x , wc.WRCNTR_SK AS WRCNTR_SK_x ,a.WTN FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_TRN_LIS_BTN_CC a INNER JOIN dw_ssp_tblsv.SSP_WIRECENTER_DIM wc ON wc.CLLI_8 = SUBSTR(a.CLLI,1,8) AND a.CLLI IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(a.CLLI) >= 8 AND a.WRCNTR_SK = -99999 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY a.BTN, a.CUST_CD,a.WTN ORDER BY a.BTN, a.CUST_CD,a.WTN, wc.WRCNTR_SK DESC ) = 1

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SEL distinct substr(WIRECENTER, 1, 8) as WIRECENTER,b.WTN,b.ST_CD FROM DW_ALV_ADMIN_TBLSV.ALV_REF_TRN_GEOLOAD_S a JOIN $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_TRN_CLLI b ON b.WTN = substr(a.TEL_RANGE,1,6) and b.CLLI is null where b.st_cd in ('DC', 'DE', 'MD','NC', 'NJ', 'PA', 'VA') QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY b.WTN,b.ST_CD ORDER BY b.WTN,b.ST_CD DESC ) = 1

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT DISTINCT BTN, CUST_CD, WTN FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.$$S_TABLE_NAME where rpt_dt_sk = $$RPT_DT_SK

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT a.BO_ID , ma.VISION_CUSTOMER_ID AS CUST_ID_NO , CASE WHEN ma.VISION_ACCOUNT_ID IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(TO_NUMBER(ma.VISION_ACCOUNT_ID),0) > 0 AND LENGTH(ma.VISION_ACCOUNT_ID) < 5 THEN CAST(ma.VISION_ACCOUNT_ID AS INTEGER) ELSE -99999 END AS ACCT_NO , a.BTN , a.CUST_CD , a.STATE_CODE , a.SOURCE_SYSTEM , a.VOL_PARENT_BO_ID , a.BO_STATUS_CODE , a.DESCRIPTION , a.LAST_MODIFIED_DATE , ma.CREATE_DATE , ma.UPDATE_DATE FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_TRN_SSP_LEC_BO_MAP a INNER JOIN ssp_ord_tblsv.MASTER_ACCOUNT ma ON ma.ACCOUNT_ID = a.VOL_PARENT_BO_ID AND ma.VISION_CUSTOMER_ID IS NOT NULL QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY a.BO_ID ORDER BY a.BO_ID, ma.UPDATE_DATE DESC, ma.CREATE_DATE DESC ) = 1

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT a.BO_ID AS BO_ID_x , CASE WHEN LENGTH(dsl.CO_CLLI_CODE) = 11 THEN dsl.CO_CLLI_CODE WHEN LENGTH(dsl.PHYSICAL_CLLI) = 11 THEN dsl.PHYSICAL_CLLI WHEN LENGTH(dsl.DSLAM_CLLI_CODE) = 11 THEN dsl.DSLAM_CLLI_CODE ELSE dsl.CO_CLLI_CODE END AS CO_CLLI_CODE_x FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_TRN_SSP_LEC_CUST_ID a INNER JOIN ssp_ord_tblsv.ORDER_MASTER om ON om.ACCOUNT_ID = a.VOL_PARENT_BO_ID AND a.VOL_PARENT_BO_ID IS NOT NULL AND om.ACCOUNT_ID IS NOT NULL INNER JOIN ssp_ord_tblsv.ORD_DSL dsl ON dsl.INT_ORDER_ID = om.INT_ORDER_ID QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY a.BO_ID ORDER BY a.BO_ID, om.ORDER_SAVE_DATE DESC ) = 1

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT a.BTN AS BTN_x , a.CUST_CD AS CUST_CD_x , wc.WRCNTR_SK AS WRCNTR_SK_x ,a.WTN FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_TRN_LIS_BTN_CC a INNER JOIN dw_ssp_tblsv.SSP_WIRECENTER_DIM wc ON wc.CLLI = a.CLLI QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY a.BTN, a.CUST_CD,a.WTN ORDER BY a.BTN, a.WTN,a.CUST_CD, wc.WRCNTR_SK DESC ) = 1

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: sel substr(WIRECENTER, 1, 8) as WIRECENTER,b.WTN,b.ST_CD from DW_ALV_ADMIN_TBLSV.ALV_REF_TRN_GEOLOAD_N a JOIN $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_TRN_CLLI b ON b.WTN = substr(a.TEL_RANGE,1,6) and b.CLLI is null where b.st_cd in ('NY', 'CT', 'RI', 'MA') QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY b.WTN,b.ST_CD ORDER BY b.WTN,b.ST_CD DESC ) = 1

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SEL A.WTN,B.CLLI,A.RPT_DT_SK,A.TRANS_ID_SK,A.SRC_SK FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME1.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST A INNER JOIN $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_TRN_CLLI B ON SUBSTR(A.WTN,1,6) = B.WTN WHERE A.WTN <> '000000' AND A.WTN IS NOT NULL AND RPT_DT_SK = $$RPT_DT_SK QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY a.TRANS_ID_SK,a.SRC_SK,a.RPT_DT_SK ORDER BY a.TRANS_ID_SK,a.SRC_SK,a.RPT_DT_SK, b.WTN DESC ) = 1

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Post SQL
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: UPDATE $$S_SCHEMA_NAME1.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST FROM ( SELECT A.TRANS_ID_SK AS TRANS_ID_SK_X , A.SRC_SK AS SRC_SK_X, A.RPT_DT_SK AS RPT_DT_SK_X, B.CLLI AS CLLI_X, B.WRCNTR_SK AS WRCNTR_SK_X FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME1.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST A INNER JOIN DW_SSP_TBLSV.SSP_WIRECENTER_DIM B ON B.CLLI = A.WRCNTR_CLLI WHERE RPT_DT_SK =$$RPT_DT_SK QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY A.TRANS_ID_SK, A.SRC_SK,A.RPT_DT_SK ORDER BY A.TRANS_ID_SK, A.SRC_SK,A.RPT_DT_SK, B.WRCNTR_SK DESC ) = 1 ) I SET WRCNTR_SK =I.WRCNTR_SK_X WHERE TRANS_ID_SK = I.TRANS_ID_SK_X AND SRC_SK = I.SRC_SK_X AND RPT_DT_SK = I.RPT_DT_SK_X;

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SEL substr(WIRECENTER, 1, 8) as WIRECENTER,b.WTN,b.ST_CD FROM DW_ALV_ADMIN_TBLSV.ALV_REF_TRN_GEOLOAD_S a JOIN $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_TRN_CLLI b ON b.WTN = substr(a.TEL_RANGE,1,6) AND b.CLLI is null WHERE b.st_cd in ('PC','PG','PQ','VC','VG') QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY b.WTN,b.ST_CD ORDER BY b.WTN,b.ST_CD DESC ) = 1

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT a.BO_ID , a.BTN , a.CUST_CD , a.STATE_CODE , a.SOURCE_SYSTEM , bm.VOL_PARENT_BO_ID , bs.BO_STATUS_CODE , bs.DESCRIPTION , bm.LAST_MODIFIED_DATE FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_TRN_SSP_LEC_BO_ID a INNER JOIN ssp_cpf_tblsv.BO_MAPPING bm ON bm.BO_ID = a.BO_ID INNER JOIN ssp_ro_tblsv.BO_STATUS bs ON bs.BO_STATUS_CODE = bm.BO_STATUS_CODE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT a.BO_ID AS BO_ID_x , CASE WHEN LENGTH(fbr.OLT_CLLI) = 11 THEN fbr.OLT_CLLI WHEN LENGTH(fbr.CO_CLLI_CODE) = 11 THEN fbr.CO_CLLI_CODE ELSE fbr.OLT_CLLI END AS CLLI_x FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_TRN_SSP_LEC_CUST_ID a INNER JOIN ssp_ord_tblsv.ORDER_MASTER om ON om.ACCOUNT_ID = a.VOL_PARENT_BO_ID AND a.VOL_PARENT_BO_ID IS NOT NULL AND om.ACCOUNT_ID IS NOT NULL AND a.CLLI IS NULL INNER JOIN ssp_ord_tblsv.ORD_FIBER fbr ON fbr.INT_ORDER_ID = om.INT_ORDER_ID QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY a.BO_ID ORDER BY a.BO_ID, om.ORDER_SAVE_DATE DESC ) = 1

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT B.BO_ID , A.BTN , A.CUST_CD , B.STATE_CODE , B.SOURCE_SYSTEM FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_TRN_LIS_BTN_CC A INNER JOIN SSP_CPF_TBLSV.CPF_SSP_LEC B ON LTRIM(RTRIM(B.BTNCC)) = LTRIM(RTRIM(A.BTN||A.CUST_CD)) WHERE A.BTN IS NOT NULL QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY B.BO_ID ORDER BY CUST_CD, B.BO_ID DESC ) = 1

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT a.BTN AS BTN_x ,a.WTN AS WTN_x , a.CUST_CD AS CUST_CD_x , b.BO_ID AS BO_ID_x , b.CUST_ID_NO AS CUST_ID_NO_x , b.ACCT_NO AS ACCT_NO_x , b.UPDATE_DATE AS UPDATE_DATE_x , b.CREATE_DATE AS CREATE_DATE_x , b.CLLI AS CLLI_x FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_TRN_LIS_BTN_CC a INNER JOIN $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_TRN_SSP_LEC_CUST_ID b ON b.BTN = a.BTN AND b.CUST_CD = a.CUST_CD QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY a.BTN, a.CUST_CD ORDER BY a.BTN, a.CUST_CD, b.UPDATE_DATE DESC, b.CREATE_DATE DESC ) = 1

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION:
UPDATE $$T_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST FROM ( SELECT A.TRANS_ID_SK AS TRANS_ID_SK_X,A.RPT_DT_SK AS RPT_DT_SK_X ,A.SRC_SK AS SRC_SK_X, B.BNDL_SK AS BNDL_NON_BNDL_SK_X FROM $$T_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST A INNER JOIN (SELECT BNDL_SK,BTN,WTN,CUSTCODE FROM DW_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_FACT_SADATABTN_NSWP A INNER JOIN DW_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_DIM_BUS_BNDL B ON A.USOC=B.EAST_BNDL_ID AND REPORT_TRACKING_IND='Y' WHERE LOB = '03000' AND REGION_IND <> 'W' ) B ON A.WTN=B.WTN --OR A.BTN=B.BTN) QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.TRANS_ID_SK,A.RPT_DT_SK,A.SRC_SK ORDER BY A.TRANS_ID_SK,A.RPT_DT_SK,A.SRC_SK,B.BNDL_SK DESC ) = 1 )D SET BNDL_NON_BNDL_SK=1 WHERE TRANS_ID_SK=D.TRANS_ID_SK_X AND RPT_DT_SK=D.RPT_DT_SK_X AND SRC_SK=D.SRC_SK_X and LOB='03';
UPDATE $$T_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST FROM ( SELECT A.TRANS_ID_SK AS TRANS_ID_SK_X,A.RPT_DT_SK AS RPT_DT_SK_X ,A.SRC_SK AS SRC_SK_X, B.BNDL_SK AS BNDL_NON_BNDL_SK_X FROM $$T_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST A INNER JOIN (SELECT BNDL_SK,BTN,WTN,CUSTCODE FROM DW_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_FACT_SADATABTN_NSWP A INNER JOIN DW_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_DIM_BUS_BNDL B ON A.USOC=B.EAST_BNDL_ID AND REPORT_TRACKING_IND='Y' WHERE LOB = '03000' AND REGION_IND <> 'W' ) B ON A.BTN=B.BTN QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.TRANS_ID_SK,A.RPT_DT_SK,A.SRC_SK ORDER BY A.TRANS_ID_SK,A.RPT_DT_SK,A.SRC_SK,B.BNDL_SK DESC ) = 1 )D SET BNDL_NON_BNDL_SK=1 WHERE TRANS_ID_SK=D.TRANS_ID_SK_X AND RPT_DT_SK=D.RPT_DT_SK_X AND SRC_SK=D.SRC_SK_X and LOB='03';
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: SQ_ALV_FACT_LEC_ACCESS_LINES_LIS_HST

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT distinct a.RPT_DT_SK ,a.ACCT_CD, a.SV_PNT_F,a.WTN,a.CUST_CD,null as NT_INDICATOR FROM $$T_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST a INNER JOIN DW_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_DIM_NETWORK_TRANS b ON b.NT_IND_SK =a.NT_IND_SK where rpt_dt_sk = $$RPT_DT_SK and 1<>1

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Pre SQL

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION:
UPDATE $$T_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST FROM ( SELECT A.TRANS_ID_SK AS TRANS_ID_SK_X,A.RPT_DT_SK AS RPT_DT_SK_X ,A.SRC_SK AS SRC_SK_X, B.BNDL_SK AS BNDL_NON_BNDL_SK_X FROM $$T_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST A INNER JOIN (SELECT BNDL_SK,BTN,WTN,CUSTCODE FROM DW_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_FACT_SADATABTN_NSWP A INNER JOIN DW_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_DIM_BUS_BNDL B ON A.USOC=B.EAST_BNDL_ID AND REPORT_TRACKING_IND='Y' WHERE LOB = '03000' AND REGION_IND <> 'W' ) B ON A.WTN=B.WTN --OR A.BTN=B.BTN) QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.TRANS_ID_SK,A.RPT_DT_SK,A.SRC_SK ORDER BY A.TRANS_ID_SK,A.RPT_DT_SK,A.SRC_SK,B.BNDL_SK DESC ) = 1 )D SET BNDL_NON_BNDL_SK=1 WHERE TRANS_ID_SK=D.TRANS_ID_SK_X AND RPT_DT_SK=D.RPT_DT_SK_X AND SRC_SK=D.SRC_SK_X and LOB='03';
UPDATE $$T_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST FROM ( SELECT A.TRANS_ID_SK AS TRANS_ID_SK_X,A.RPT_DT_SK AS RPT_DT_SK_X ,A.SRC_SK AS SRC_SK_X, B.BNDL_SK AS BNDL_NON_BNDL_SK_X FROM $$T_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST A INNER JOIN (SELECT BNDL_SK,BTN,WTN,CUSTCODE FROM DW_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_FACT_SADATABTN_NSWP A INNER JOIN DW_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_DIM_BUS_BNDL B ON A.USOC=B.EAST_BNDL_ID AND REPORT_TRACKING_IND='Y' WHERE LOB = '03000' AND REGION_IND <> 'W' ) B ON A.BTN=B.BTN QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.TRANS_ID_SK,A.RPT_DT_SK,A.SRC_SK ORDER BY A.TRANS_ID_SK,A.RPT_DT_SK,A.SRC_SK,B.BNDL_SK DESC ) = 1 )D SET BNDL_NON_BNDL_SK=1 WHERE TRANS_ID_SK=D.TRANS_ID_SK_X AND RPT_DT_SK=D.RPT_DT_SK_X AND SRC_SK=D.SRC_SK_X and LOB='03';
INSTANCE.NAME: SQ_ALV_FACT_LEC_ACCESS_LINES_LIS_HST

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT distinct substr(WTN,1,6) as WTN, ST_CD FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME1.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST where rpt_dt_sk = $$RPT_DT_SK and WRCNTR_CLLI is null and st_cd is not null qualify row_number() over(partition by wtn, st_cd order by wtn, st_cd) = 1
--SELECT distinct substr(WTN,1,6) as WTN, ST_CD --FROM OS_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_FACT_LEC_ACCESS_LINES_LIS_HST where rpt_dt_sk = (sel max(rpt_dt_sk) from OS_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_FACT_LEC_ACCESS_LINES_LIS_HST )and WRCNTR_CLLI is null --and st_cd is not null

MAPPING.DESCRIPTION: Updating WTN into BTN for MDV states ('DC','VA','VC','VQ''VG','MD')
MAPPING.NAME: m_ALV_99911_UPD_BTN_ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT A.TRANS_ID_SK, A.RPT_DT_SK, A.SRC_SK, A.SV_PNT_F,B.WTN ,B.CUST_CD FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST A INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT B.RPT_DT_SK, B.SRC_SK, B.SV_PNT_F,B.WTN, B.CUST_CD FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST B WHERE B.ACCT_CD IS NOT NULL AND B.CUST_CD IS NOT NULL AND ST_CD IN ('DC','VA','VC','VQ''VG','MD') AND RPT_DT_SK = $$RPT_DT_SK )B ON A.SV_PNT_F=B.SV_PNT_F AND A.RPT_DT_SK=B.RPT_DT_SK WHERE A.RPT_DT_SK = $$RPT_DT_SK AND A.ST_CD IN ('DC','VA','VC','VQ''VG','MD') QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY a.TRANS_ID_SK, a.RPT_DT_SK, a.SRC_SK ORDER BY a.TRANS_ID_SK, a.RPT_DT_SK, a.SRC_SK,TRIM(B.CUST_CD) DESC ) = 1

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: UPDATE $$T_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST SET BTN = :TU.BTN, CUST_CD = :TU.CUST_CD WHERE TRANS_ID_SK = :TU.TRANS_ID_SK AND RPT_DT_SK = :TU.RPT_DT_SK AND SRC_SK = :TU.SRC_SK
INSTANCE.NAME: ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST1

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT a.BO_ID AS BO_ID_x , CASE WHEN LENGTH(ov.OLT_CLLI) = 11 THEN ov.OLT_CLLI WHEN LENGTH(ov.CO_CLLI_CODE) = 11 THEN ov.CO_CLLI_CODE ELSE ov.OLT_CLLI END AS CLLI_x FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_TRN_SSP_LEC_CUST_ID a INNER JOIN ssp_ord_tblsv.ORDER_MASTER om ON om.ACCOUNT_ID = a.VOL_PARENT_BO_ID AND a.VOL_PARENT_BO_ID IS NOT NULL AND om.ACCOUNT_ID IS NOT NULL AND a.CLLI IS NULL INNER JOIN ssp_ord_tblsv.ORD_VIDEO ov ON ov.INT_ORDER_ID = om.INT_ORDER_ID QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY a.BO_ID ORDER BY a.BO_ID, om.ORDER_SAVE_DATE DESC ) = 1

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT A.RPT_DT_SK , B.CLLI AS WRCNTR_CLLI_X , B.WRCNTR_SK AS WRCNTR_SK_X , B.CUST_ID_NO AS VISION_CUST_ID_NO_X , B.ACCT_NO AS VISION_ACCT_NO_X ,A.SRC_SK ,A.TRANS_ID_SK FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST A INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT BTN,CUST_CD,CLLI,WRCNTR_SK,CUST_ID_NO,ACCT_NO FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME1.ALV_TRN_LIS_BTN_CC WHERE CUST_ID_NO <> -99999 AND BTN IS NOT NULL) B ON A.BTN=B.BTN AND A.CUST_CD = B.CUST_CD WHERE RPT_DT_SK = $$RPT_DT_SK AND ST_CD IN ('MD','DC','VA') AND B.BTN IS NOT NULL QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY A.TRANS_ID_SK,A.SRC_SK,A.RPT_DT_SK ORDER BY A.TRANS_ID_SK,A.SRC_SK,A.RPT_DT_SK, B.CLLI DESC ) = 1

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Post SQL

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Session Log File Max Time Period
Email Text
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: Folder: %n Workflow: %w Session name: %s Integration Service name: %v Session Details: %t

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Post SQL
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: update os_alv_admin.ALV_TRN_LIS_BTN_CC from ( SELECT a.BTN AS BTN_x ,a.WTN AS WTN_x , a.CUST_CD AS CUST_CD_x , b.BO_ID AS BO_ID_x , b.CUST_ID_NO AS CUST_ID_NO_x , b.ACCT_NO AS ACCT_NO_x , b.UPDATE_DATE AS UPDATE_DATE_x , b.CREATE_DATE AS CREATE_DATE_x , b.CLLI AS CLLI_x FROM os_alv_admin_tblsv.ALV_TRN_LIS_BTN_CC a INNER JOIN os_alv_admin_tblsv.ALV_TRN_SSP_LEC_CUST_ID b ON b.BTN = a.BTN AND b.CUST_CD = a.CUST_CD QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY a.BTN, a.CUST_CD ORDER BY a.BTN, a.CUST_CD, b.UPDATE_DATE DESC, b.CREATE_DATE DESC ) = 1) x set BO_ID=x.BO_ID_x, CUST_ID_NO =x.CUST_ID_NO_x, ACCT_NO=x.ACCT_NO_x, UPDATE_DATE=x.UPDATE_DATE_x, CREATE_DATE=x.CREATE_DATE_x, CLLI=x.CLLI_x where btn=x.btn_x and wtn=x.wtn_x and cust_cd=x.cust_cd_x;

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT a.BTN AS BTN_x ,a.WTN AS WTN_x , a.CUST_CD AS CUST_CD_x , b.BO_ID AS BO_ID_x , cast(b.CUST_ID_NO as integer) AS CUST_ID_NO_x , b.ACCT_NO AS ACCT_NO_x , b.UPDATE_DATE AS UPDATE_DATE_x , b.CREATE_DATE AS CREATE_DATE_x , b.CLLI AS CLLI_x FROM os_alv_admin_tblsv.ALV_TRN_LIS_BTN_CC a INNER JOIN os_alv_admin_tblsv.ALV_TRN_SSP_LEC_CUST_ID b ON b.BTN = a.BTN AND b.CUST_CD = a.CUST_CD QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY a.BTN, a.CUST_CD ORDER BY a.BTN, a.CUST_CD, b.UPDATE_DATE DESC, b.CREATE_DATE DESC ) = 1 WHERE 1<>1

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_ALV_99924_WRCNTR_CLLI_NULL_UPD_SS.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_ALV_99924_WRCNTR_CLLI_NULL_UPD_SS.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_ALV_99924_WRCNTR_CLLI_NULL_UPD_SS.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_ALV_99927_WRCNTR_CLLI_NULL_UPD_FINAL.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_ALV_99927_WRCNTR_CLLI_NULL_UPD_FINAL.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_ALV_99927_WRCNTR_CLLI_NULL_UPD_FINAL.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_ALV_99926_WRCNTR_CLLI_NULL_UPD_PS.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_ALV_99919_TRN_GET_CUST_ID_NO.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_ALV_99919_TRN_GET_CUST_ID_NO.ErrorCode

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT TM_SK AS MDV_SNAPSHOT_DT_SK, DATA_DATE AS MDV_SNAPSHOT_DT, ( SELECT max(tm_sk) as NPDNE_SNAPSHOT_DT_SK FROM OS_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_LEC_LIS_HST a inner join mdr_dw_tblsv.time_Dim b on cast(a.add_dt as date)=b.day_dt where cast(add_dt as date) >= current_date-7) AS NPDNE_SNAPSHOT_DT_SK, ( SELECT MAX(cast(add_dt as date) ) AS DATA_DATE FROM OS_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_LEC_LIS_HST where cast(add_dt as date) >= current_date-7) as NPDNE_SNAPSHOT_DT, DATA_DATE -1 AS SRC_MDV_DATE, ( SELECT MAX(data_date ) AS DATA_DATE FROM OS_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_LEC_LIS_HST where cast(add_dt as date) >= current_date-7) as SRC_NPDNYNE_DATE, (SELECT MAX(cast(add_dt as date) ) AS DATA_DATE FROM OS_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_LEC_LIS_MDV_HST) as SRC_MDV_ADD_DT, (SELECT MAX(cast(add_dt as date) ) AS DATA_DATE FROM OS_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_LEC_LIS_HST) as SRC_NPDNYNE_ADD_DT, TM_SK -1 AS RPT_DT_SK, DATA_DATE -1 AS RPT_DT, 'LEC_MDV' FROM ( SELECT MAX(DATA_DATE) AS DATA_DATE FROM OS_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_LEC_LIS_MDV_HST ) X INNER JOIN MDR_DW_TBLSV.TIME_DIM Y ON X.DATA_DATE=Y.DAY_DT

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Task to EMAIL to the List provided in $sessionEmailFailure
TASK.NAME: email_on_failure

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Email Text
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: Folder: %n Workflow: %w Session name: %s Integration Service name: %v Session Details: %t

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT ETL_PROC_SK, FACT_TBL_NM FROM $$T_SCHEMA.ALV_CTL_TGT_FACT WHERE STAT_CD ='R'

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT TRIM(SUM(1) OVER(ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)) as TRANS_ID_SK, (select rpt_dt_sk from $$T_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_CTL_TGT_FACT where STAT_CD ='R') as RPT_DT_SK, '2' AS SRC_SK, cast(add_dt as date) as snapshot_date, data_date as DATA_DATE, data_date +1 as SRC_N_DATA_DATE, 'u' as ACCT_CD, 'u' as SV_PNT_F, BTN, WTN, CUST_CD, CASE when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '00' then '12' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '01' then '01' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '02' then '05' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '03' then '07' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '04' then '04' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '05' then '03' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '06' then '02' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '07' then '08' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '08' then '10' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '09' then '09' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '10' then '10' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '11' then '06' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '12' then '11' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '14' then '14' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '33' then '33' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '35' then '35' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '45' then '45' else lob END as LOB, CLASSOFSVC, a.svc_st as ST_CD, USOC, CASE WHEN access_line_ind ='Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as SYS_ACCESS_LINE_IND_SK, SVC_ST_DATE as SVC_ST_DT, coalesce(c.st_sk,-99999) as ST_SK, coalesce(d.LOB_SK,-99999) as LOB_SK, CASE WHEN FTTP_LINE ='F' THEN 1 WHEN FTTP_LINE ='Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as FTTP_SK, QTY AS METRIC_VAL FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_LEC_LIS_HST A INNER JOIN MDR_DW_TBLSV.TIME_DIM B ON data_date =B.DAY_DT left outer join DW_SSP_TBLSV.SSP_STATE_DIM c on a.svc_st=c.st_cd left join ( SELECT A.LOB_SK as LOB_SK,SUBSTR(A.PLOB,2,2) as PLOB FROM DW_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_DIM_MTHLY_LOB A) d on CASE when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '00' then '12' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '01' then '01' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '02' then '05' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '03' then '07' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '04' then '04' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '05' then '03' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '06' then '02' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '07' then '08' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '08' then '10' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '09' then '09' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '10' then '10' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '11' then '06' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '12' then '11' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '14' then '14' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '33' then '33' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '35' then '35' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '45' then '45' else lob END = d.plob where (cast(add_dt as date),svc_st) IN $$DATA_DATE and (CASE when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '00' then '12' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '01' then '01' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '02' then '05' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '03' then '07' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '04' then '04' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '05' then '03' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '06' then '02' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '07' then '08' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '08' then '10' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '09' then '09' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '10' then '10' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '11' then '06' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '12' then '11' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '14' then '14' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '33' then '33' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '35' then '35' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '45' then '45' else lob END) IN $$LOB

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Pre SQL
Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT TRIM(SUM(1) OVER(ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)) as TRANS_ID_SK, (select rpt_dt_sk from OS_ALV_tblsv.ALV_CTL_TGT_FACT where STAT_CD ='R') as RPT_DT_SK, '2' AS SRC_SK, cast(a.add_dt as date) as snapshot_date, data_date as DATA_DATE, data_date +1 as SRC_N_DATA_DATE, 'u' as ACCT_CD, 'u' as SV_PNT_F, BTN, WTN, CUST_CD, CASE when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '00' then '12' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '01' then '01' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '02' then '05' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '03' then '07' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '04' then '04' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '05' then '03' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '06' then '02' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '07' then '08' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '08' then '10' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '09' then '09' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '10' then '10' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '11' then '06' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '12' then '11' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '14' then '14' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '33' then '33' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '35' then '35' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '45' then '45' else lob END as LOB, CLASSOFSVC, a.svc_st as ST_CD, USOC, CASE WHEN access_line_ind ='Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as SYS_ACCESS_LINE_IND_SK, SVC_ST_DATE as SVC_ST_DT, coalesce(c.st_sk,-99999) as ST_SK, coalesce(d.LOB_SK,-99999) as LOB_SK, CASE WHEN FTTP_LINE ='F' THEN 1 WHEN FTTP_LINE ='Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as FTTP_SK, QTY AS METRIC_VAL FROM OS_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_LEC_LIS_HST A INNER JOIN MDR_DW_TBLSV.TIME_DIM B ON data_date =B.DAY_DT inner join OS_ALV_TBLSV.vt_max_dt v on trunc(a.add_dt) = trunc(v.add_dt) and a.svc_st = v.svc_st_d left outer join DW_SSP_TBLSV.SSP_STATE_DIM c on a.svc_st=c.st_cd left join ( SELECT A.LOB_SK as LOB_SK,SUBSTR(A.PLOB,2,2) as PLOB FROM DW_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_DIM_MTHLY_LOB A) d on CASE when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '00' then '12' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '01' then '01' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '02' then '05' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '03' then '07' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '04' then '04' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '05' then '03' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '06' then '02' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '07' then '08' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '08' then '10' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '09' then '09' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '10' then '10' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '11' then '06' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '12' then '11' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '14' then '14' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '33' then '33' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '35' then '35' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '45' then '45' else lob END = d.plob where CASE when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '00' then '12' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '01' then '01' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '02' then '05' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '03' then '07' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '04' then '04' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '05' then '03' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '06' then '02' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '07' then '08' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '08' then '10' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '09' then '09' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '10' then '10' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '11' then '06' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '12' then '11' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '14' then '14' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '33' then '33' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '35' then '35' when svc_st in ('NJ', 'PA','DE','PC','PG','PQ') and lob = '45' then '45' else lob END IN $$LOB

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT a.RPT_DT_SK,'1' AS ALV_ACCESS_LINE_IND_sk FROM OS_ALV.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST A WHERE CLASSOFSVC ||'-'||USOC IN (SELECT ALISPRODUCT FROM DW_ALV_ADMIN_TBLSV.ALV_REF_TRN_PRODLOAD_S where first_lvl_hier_grp = 'Total Access Lines Plus UNE Platforms') AND DATA_DATE= ( sel max(data_date) from OS_ALV.ALV_FACT_LEC_LINES_LIS_HST ) and ST_CD in ('MD', 'VA','DC') and 1<>1

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Post SQL

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Post SQL
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT TRIM(SUM(1) OVER(ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)) AS TRANS_ID_SK, B.TM_SK AS RPT_DT_SK, '1' AS SRC_SK, DATA_DATE AS SNAPSHOT_DATE, DATA_DATE -1 AS DATA_DATE, DATA_DATE AS SRC_S_DATA_DATE, ACCT_CD, SV_PNT_F, CASE WHEN CUST_CD IS NOT NULL AND A.ST_CD IN ('MD', 'DC','VA','VC','VG','VQ') THEN WTN ELSE NULL END AS BTN, WTN, CUST_CD, LOB, CLASSOFSVC, A.ST_CD AS ST_CD, USOC, CASE WHEN ACCESS_LINE_IND ='Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS SYS_ACCESS_LINE_IND_SK, SVC_ST_DATE AS SVC_ST_DT, COALESCE(C.ST_SK,-99999) AS ST_SK, COALESCE(D.LOB_SK,-99999) AS LOB_SK, CASE WHEN FTTP_LINE ='Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FTTP_SK, 1 AS METRIC_VAL, NKAU_CU_LN_F, POF, POE, SEGMENT_CD, SVC_TYP_CD FROM $$S_SCHEMA_NAME.ALV_LEC_LIS_MDV_HST A INNER JOIN MDR_DW_TBLSV.TIME_DIM B ON DATA_DATE-1=B.DAY_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN DW_SSP_TBLSV.SSP_STATE_DIM C ON A.ST_CD=C.ST_CD LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.LOB_SK AS LOB_SK,SUBSTR(A.PLOB,2,2) AS PLOB FROM DW_ALV_TBLSV.ALV_DIM_MTHLY_LOB A) D ON LOB = D.PLOB WHERE CAST(ADD_DT as DATE) = $$DATA_DATE AND LOB IN $$LOB

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Post SQL

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Post SQL

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Pre SQL
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails

WORKFLOW.DESCRIPTION: Final Access Lines LIS workflow - combines NPD NY NE and MDV LIS data and marks Access Lines
WORKFLOW.NAME: wkfl_ALV_LEC_ACCESS_LIS_FINAL

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_ALV_999_FINAL_ACCESS_LINE_LIS_HST_UPD.PrevTaskStatus

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub
